description: Synthetic injury (permanent-disability) MACT case. Engineered to contain exactly one cross-stream contradiction (accident date: police FIR 15/03/2024 vs hospital records 16/03/2024) and one in-stream correction (annual income revised by the authoritative Form 16). All persons, numbers, and documents are fictional.

expected_findings.contradiction: accident_date: police FIR says 2024-03-15; medical records say 2024-03-16
